name: Route export: GPX download
description: Expose a GPX (XML) download of a route's GPS track, built from the routes.geometry PostGIS column. Simple and small -- one endpoint, one query, one XML serializer.
acceptance_criteria: GET /v1/routes/:dongle_id/:route_name/export.gpx returns GPX 1.1 XML with a single <trk>/<trkseg> containing one <trkpt lat=... lon=...> per coordinate in the geometry, in order
Uses ST_AsText or ST_DumpPoints to read the LineString; encode via encoding/xml (no external lib)
404 when the route has no geometry (not a 500 or empty file)
internal/api/export_test.go (or a new gpx_test.go) covers: valid GPX schema (parseable by encoding/xml round-trip), 404 when geometry is NULL, 200 with the right byte count when geometry has N points
go vet ./... and go build ./... pass cleanly
